name: Layered Date Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pitted dates (10 oz) = coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Laura Hunter
Preheat oven to 350.
In a 2-quart saucepan, heat dates, walnuts, sugar, and 1 1/4 cups water to boiling over high heat. Reduce heat to low; simmer, uncovered, for 10 to 15 minutes, until dates are soft and mixture is thick, stirring occasionally. Set aside.
In a large bowl, combine flour, oats, brown sugar, and baking soda. Knead in butter by hand until dough forms.
Press half of the dough evenly into the bottom of a 13" x 9" metal baking pan.
Bake for 15 minutes or until pale golden.
Spread date mixture evenly over hot crust. Sprinkle remaining oat mixture on top.
Bake for an additional 25 minutes, or until golden. Cool completely in pan on wire rack.
When cool, cut lengthwise into 4 strips, then cut each strip crosswise into 8 pieces.
